tool_support.notes: Manual covers named platform families; verify exact vehicle and active licence.

tool_support.method: Read immobiliser data from the opened original working key; no instrument-cluster removal for this route.
required_hardware: Supported Autel IKEY or key PCB
tool_support.limits: Official coverage is model/year and Add Key specific. It does not verify AKL, every trim/key PCB, UK RHD locations or unrelated generations.

procedures.name: All keys lost
procedures.method: Abrites documents conditional BCM2 AKL when ECU/TCU component security can be read for A6/A7/A8.
procedures.required_adapters: PROTAG ZN003/ZN002 is stated for supported key programming; additional AKL cables may be required and must be checked for the exact job.
